title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: Arbitrary code execution via interpreter-to-baseline OSR Code type confusion
bounty_rationale: report of V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating arbitrary code execution outside the V8 heap sandbox
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

V8 sandbox bypass, arbitrary native code execution (without JIT page overwrite) via OSR Code type confusion. Interpreter & builtins double-fetches `Code` from `sfi.trusted_function_data` where the interpreter asserts that it is a Code object but the builtin s
